Home/International Removals/Portugal
The Move

Portugal has become one of our fastest growing routes.

From Lisbon to the Algarve, more British families are choosing Portugal every year, and we have built a dependable road service to match. Dedicated vehicles leave regularly, so your belongings travel with crews who know the route well.

Road freight keeps a Portuguese move quick and flexible. A dedicated load gives you the fastest door to door service, while a part load shares vehicle space and splits the cost.

Popular destinations we deliver to
LisbonPortoFaro CascaisBragaCoimbra The Algarve
Typical Transit Times
Dedicated road service4–6 days
Part-load (groupage)1–2 weeks
Times shown are door to door. Please allow a little extra for customs formalities. We recommend booking 6 to 8 weeks ahead of your move date.
Your options

Choose the right way to move

Every Portuguese move is different, so we shape the service around yours.

Road · Dedicated

A vehicle reserved for your move

One crew loads at your door in the UK and the same crew delivers in Portugal a few days later. Nothing is transhipped and nothing waits in a depot.

Best for: full households, fixed dates
Road · Part-load

Share the vehicle, share the cost

Your goods travel alongside other Portuguese moves on a scheduled departure. A little more patience, a noticeably smaller bill.

Best for: smaller moves, flexible budgets
The Algarve

Coastal deliveries covered

We regularly deliver along the Algarve coast, from Lagos to Tavira, alongside our city routes to Lisbon and Porto.

Best for: coastal relocations
Excess Baggage

A few boxes or suitcases

Not moving a whole household? Our excess baggage service is a simple, affordable way to send personal items and smaller consignments overseas.

Best for: light movers & students
Good to know

Moving to Portugal now takes paperwork, and we handle it

UK households entering Portugal pass through customs, and the right documents make all the difference. We prepare everything with you well before moving day, so your belongings keep moving.

Customs declarations

Your shipment travels with a full inventory and the declarations Portuguese customs expect.

Your NIF number

Most imports need your NIF, the Portuguese tax identification number. We will guide you on timing.

Duty relief on household goods

Used personal effects usually enter free of duty when you transfer your main residence to Portugal.

Residency evidence

Proof of your move, such as a visa or residence registration, supports the relief claim.

Our container reached the Algarve in under a week, and the crew unloaded everything with the same care they showed packing us in Surrey. It felt like one continuous team the whole way.
